rule: Use speed v5 as the active speed context going forward.
Retain speed v4 identity-enriched outputs as baseline and legacy comparison artifacts.
Prefer Speed_Limit_RNS route+measure evidence over speed v4 when v5 provides stable speed assignment.
Preserve v4/v5 conflicts as QA comparison evidence; do not treat them as blockers to v5 promotion.
Keep v5 remaining review and missing statuses visible; do not force labels.
Do not impute speed values. Stable v5 assignment requires route+measure evidence from Speed_Limit_RNS.
Refresh downstream context, descriptive, rate, and model outputs before treating them as using active v5 speed.
